# Anchor Action

> Action with anchors/aliases

## Usage

<code>
- uses: your-org/@main
  with:
    bar: # Default description
    defaults: # Default description
    foo: # Overridden description
</code>

## Inputs

- **bar**: Default description

- **defaults**: Default description

- **foo**: Overridden description (**required**)

## Example

See the [action.yml](./action.yml) for a full reference.
